sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Search for 'W' in ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
found_W = []
for i, line in enumerate(ascii_lines):
    for j, ch in enumerate(line):
        if ch == 'W':
            found_W.append((i, j))
print(f"Found {len(found_W)} 'W' characters at: {found_W[:20]}")

# Also check for other possible player colors
for color in ['W', 'w']:
    count = sum(line.count(color) for line in ascii_lines)
    print(f"'{color}' count: {count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Try UP to see if player respawns
result = action(['UP'])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
player_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'W']
print(f"Player nodes after UP: {len(player_nodes)}")
for p in player_nodes:
    b = p['boundary']
    r_min = min(r for r,c in b)
    c_min = min(c for r,c in b)
    print(f"  W at ({r_min},{c_min}), pixels={p['pixels']}")

# Check ascii for W
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
w_count = sum(line.count('W') for line in ascii_lines)
print(f"'W' count in ascii: {w_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
